[1;2m› [0m[38;5;6m/permissions[39m experimental


[2m• [0mI can’t change permissions directly from here. If you want to run a command or task that needs approval, send it and
  I’ll request escalation when required.


[1;2m› [0mRead README.md and summarize it in one sentence.


[2m• [0mI’ll read the repository README and condense only that content into one sentence.

[2m•[0m [1mExplored[0m
[2m  └ [0m[38;5;6mRead[39m README.md

[2m────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• [0mCLI Agent Orchestrator (CAO) is a local multi-agent framework that runs existing AI coding CLIs in isolated tmux
  sessions and coordinates them through supervisor-worker workflows over MCP, with CLI, web UI, scheduling, plugins,
  memory, and cross-provider support.

[2m────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


[0m  [1mHooks[0m
  [2mLifecycle hooks from config and enabled plugins.[0m

  Event                 Installed   Active      Description
  [1m[38;5;6mPreToolUse            0           0           Before a tool executes[0m
  PermissionRequest     [2m0           0           When permission is requested[0m
  PostToolUse           [2m0           0           After a tool executes[0m
  PreCompact            [2m0           0           Before context compaction[0m
  PostCompact           [2m0           0           After context compaction[0m
  SessionStart          [2m0           0           When a new session starts[0m
  UserPromptSubmit      [2m0           0           When the user submits a prompt[0m
  SubagentStart         [2m0           0           When a subagent is created[0m
  SubagentStop          [2m0           0           Right before a subagent ends its turn[0m
  Stop                  [2m0           0           Right before Codex ends its turn[0m

  [2mPress enter to view hooks; esc to close
